title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive, Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter and Sign Into Renewal of Contract of Lease with Market Stallholders of the Batong Malake Public Market, Los Baños, Laguna to Legalize Occupancy and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. JOZYLYN N. MANANSALA, 08/16/21)
